name: goal-dual-plugin
description: Claude Code /goal の実装ステップだけを Codex に委譲する Claude Code plugin skill

scripts.verify: jq empty package.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json plugins/goal-dual/.claude-plugin/plugin.json schemas/*.json && bash -n install.sh && find plugins/goal-dual/scripts -name '*.sh' -exec bash -n {} \; && find plugins/goal-dual/bin -type f -exec bash -n {} \; && npm test
